Part.Source:
Event Start
LoadWWPContext(&Context)
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
GridAniversarios.Rows = Page.Rows &GridAniversariosCurrentPage = 1 &GridAniversariosCurrentPage.Visible = False &GridAniversariosPageCount = -1 &OqueFazerData = new()
&OqueFazerDataItem = new() &OqueFazerDataItem.Title = 'Hoje' &OqueFazerDataItem.Icon = DDOMultiselOption.Link() &OqueFazerDataItem.EventKey = !'Hoje' &OqueFazerDataItem.IsDivider = False &OqueFazerData.Add(&OqueFazerDataItem)
&OqueFazerDataItem = new() &OqueFazerDataItem.Title = 'Na Semana' &OqueFazerDataItem.Icon = DDOMultiselOption.Link() &OqueFazerDataItem.EventKey = !'Nasemana' &OqueFazerDataItem.IsDivider = False &OqueFazerData.Add(&OqueFazerDataItem)
&OqueFazerDataItem = new() &OqueFazerDataItem.Title = 'No Mês' &OqueFazerDataItem.Icon = DDOMultiselOption.Link() &OqueFazerDataItem.EventKey = !'NoMes' &OqueFazerDataItem.IsDivider = False &OqueFazerData.Add(&OqueFazerDataItem)
&OqueFazerDataItem = new() &OqueFazerDataItem.Title = '2 Dias Antes e 5 Depois.' &OqueFazerDataItem.Icon = DDOMultiselOption.Link() &OqueFazerDataItem.EventKey = !'DoisAntesCincoDepois' &OqueFazerDataItem.IsDivider = False &OqueFazerData.Add(&OqueFazerDataItem)
&OqueFazerDataItem = new() &OqueFazerDataItem.Title = 'Próx. 30 dias.' &OqueFazerDataItem.Icon = DDOMultiselOption.Link() &OqueFazerDataItem.EventKey = !'Prox30' &OqueFazerDataItem.IsDivider = False &OqueFazerData.Add(&OqueFazerDataItem)
GridAniversariosPaginationBar.RowsPerPageSelectedValue = GridAniversarios.Rows
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
padraousuario.Call('L', 'FUNCIONARIO_ANIVERSARIO', &Context.PesCod, &Context.EmpCod, &OpcaoAniversario, &PadDtaMod) do 'OpcaoSelecionada'
EndEvent
Event Refresh
prcCarregaAniversarioFuncionario.Call(&Context.EmpCod, &OpcaoAniversario, &SDT_PessoaAniversario) &GridAniversariosPageCount = GridAniversarios.PageCount &GridAniversariosCurrentPage = GridAniversarios.CurrentPage &LinhaPorPag = GridAniversarios.Rows
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
//The variable '&GridAniversariosPageCount' must be assigned manually in order to get a correct behaviour of the Pagination Bar.
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndEvent
Event GridAniversarios.Load
&GridAniversariosPageCount = 1 &GridAniversariosPag = 0 &LinhaPorPag = GridAniversarios.Rows For &SDT_PessoaAniversarioItem In &SDT_PessoaAniversario &GridDiaMes = &SDT_PessoaAniversarioItem.DiaMes
If &GridDiaMes = 'HOJE' &GridDiaMes.ForeColor = RGB(0,60,200) Else &GridDiaMes.ForeColor = RGB(0,0,0) Endif
&Aniversariante = &SDT_PessoaAniversarioItem.PesRaz &Idade = Trim(ToFormattedString(&SDT_PessoaAniversarioItem.Idade)) &Telefone = Trim(ToFormattedString(&SDT_PessoaAniversarioItem.PesFonNum)) &Email = Trim(ToFormattedString(&SDT_PessoaAniversarioItem.PesEml))
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
//this code should be inside the For Each used to load the grid
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
If Not &PesRaz.IsEmpty() If Trim(&SDT_PessoaAniversarioItem.PesRaz) Like '%' + Trim(&PesRaz) &GridAniversariosPag += 1 If &GridAniversariosPag = &LinhaPorPag &GridAniversariosPageCount += 1 &GridAniversariosPag = 0 EndIf Load Endif Else &GridAniversariosPag += 1 If &GridAniversariosPag = &LinhaPorPag &GridAniversariosPageCount += 1 &GridAniversariosPag = 0 EndIf Load EndIf EndFor
EndEvent
Event GridAniversariosPaginationBar.ChangePage
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
Do Case Case GridAniversariosPaginationBar.SelectedPage = !'Previous' &GridAniversariosCurrentPage -= 1 GridAniversarios.PreviousPage() Case GridAniversariosPaginationBar.SelectedPage = !'Next' &GridAniversariosCurrentPage += 1 GridAniversarios.NextPage() Otherwise &PageToGo.FromString(GridAniversariosPaginationBar.SelectedPage) &GridAniversariosCurrentPage = &PageToGo GridAniversarios.GotoPage(&PageToGo) EndCase Refresh
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndEvent
Event GridAniversariosPaginationBar.ChangeRowsPerPage
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
GridAniversarios.Rows = GridAniversariosPaginationBar.RowsPerPageSelectedValue &GridAniversariosCurrentPage = 1 GridAniversarios.FirstPage()
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndEvent
Event ddo_OqueFazer.OnOptionClicked
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
Do Case Case ddo_OqueFazer.ActiveEventKey = !'Hoje' Do 'Do Hoje' Case ddo_OqueFazer.ActiveEventKey = !'Nasemana' Do 'Do Nasemana' Case ddo_OqueFazer.ActiveEventKey = !'NoMes' Do 'Do NoMes' Case ddo_OqueFazer.ActiveEventKey = !'DoisAntesCincoDepois' Do 'Do DoisAntesCincoDepois' Case ddo_OqueFazer.ActiveEventKey = !'Prox30' Do 'Do Prox30' EndCase
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndEvent
Event 'DoImprimir'
&Aniversariantes = &SDT_PessoaAniversario.ToXml() &WebSession.Set(!"FuncionariosAniversario", &Aniversariantes)
&NomeArquivo = 'RELATORIOANIVERSÁRIO' RCOOpenWindow1.LinkOpen = RELJAS159.Link(&Context.EmpCod, &Context.FilCod, &Context.PesCod) RCOOpenWindow1.OpenWindow(True, 500, 500, True, 0, 0, False)
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndEvent
Sub 'Do Hoje'
&OpcaoAniversario = 'H' do 'GravaOpcao'
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndSub
Sub 'Do Nasemana'
&OpcaoAniversario = 'S' do 'GravaOpcao'
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndSub
Sub 'Do NoMes'
&OpcaoAniversario = 'M' do 'GravaOpcao'
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndSub
Sub 'Do DoisAntesCincoDepois'
&OpcaoAniversario = 'P' do 'GravaOpcao'
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndSub
Sub 'Do Prox30'
&OpcaoAniversario = 'A' do 'GravaOpcao'
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndSub
Event &PesRaz.ControlValueChanged
GridAniversarios.Refresh()
EndEvent
Sub 'GravaOpcao'
padraousuario.Call('G', 'FUNCIONARIO_ANIVERSARIO', &Context.PesCod, &Context.EmpCod, &OpcaoAniversario, &PadDtaMod) do 'OpcaoSelecionada' Refresh
EndSub
Sub 'OpcaoSelecionada'
&OqueFazerData.Clear() &OqueFazerData = new()
&OqueFazerDataItem = new() &OqueFazerDataItem.Title = 'Hoje' if &OpcaoAniversario = 'H' or &OpcaoAniversario.IsEmpty() &OqueFazerDataItem.Icon = DDOMultiselSelOption.Link() Else &OqueFazerDataItem.Icon = DDOMultiselOption.Link() Endif &OqueFazerDataItem.EventKey = !'Hoje' &OqueFazerDataItem.IsDivider = False &OqueFazerData.Add(&OqueFazerDataItem)
&OqueFazerDataItem = new() &OqueFazerDataItem.Title = 'Na Semana' if &OpcaoAniversario = 'S' &OqueFazerDataItem.Icon = DDOMultiselSelOption.Link() Else &OqueFazerDataItem.Icon = DDOMultiselOption.Link() Endif &OqueFazerDataItem.EventKey = !'Nasemana' &OqueFazerDataItem.IsDivider = False &OqueFazerData.Add(&OqueFazerDataItem)
&OqueFazerDataItem = new() &OqueFazerDataItem.Title = 'No Mês' if &OpcaoAniversario = 'M' &OqueFazerDataItem.Icon = DDOMultiselSelOption.Link() Else &OqueFazerDataItem.Icon = DDOMultiselOption.Link() Endif &OqueFazerDataItem.EventKey = !'NoMes' &OqueFazerDataItem.IsDivider = False &OqueFazerData.Add(&OqueFazerDataItem)
&OqueFazerDataItem = new() &OqueFazerDataItem.Title = '2 Dias Antes e 5 Depois.' if &OpcaoAniversario = 'P' &OqueFazerDataItem.Icon = DDOMultiselSelOption.Link() Else &OqueFazerDataItem.Icon = DDOMultiselOption.Link() Endif &OqueFazerDataItem.EventKey = !'DoisAntesCincoDepois' &OqueFazerDataItem.IsDivider = False &OqueFazerData.Add(&OqueFazerDataItem)
&OqueFazerDataItem = new() &OqueFazerDataItem.Title = 'Próx. 30 dias.' if &OpcaoAniversario = 'A' &OqueFazerDataItem.Icon = DDOMultiselSelOption.Link() Else &OqueFazerDataItem.Icon = DDOMultiselOption.Link() Endif &OqueFazerDataItem.EventKey = !'Prox30' &OqueFazerDataItem.IsDivider = False &OqueFazerData.Add(&OqueFazerDataItem)
EndSub
